name: Linguine Chekeni (Pasta with Grilled Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the olive oil, garlic, salt, onion powder, lemon juice, sesame oil, black pepper, and fresh oregano in a bowl.
2. Place the chicken breasts in a non-metallic container.
3. Pour the marinade over the chicken, turning to coat evenly.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 1-24 hours.
5. Grill the chicken for 2 minutes on each side over high heat.
6. Lower the temperature and continue cooking until the thickest part of the chicken shows no pink and juices run clear.
7. Slice the chicken thinly before adding it to the sauce.
